name: filter_empty_of_empty_seq
reason: tests that filtering an empty sequence produces empty — if filter is misaxiomatized on empty sequences this could fail

name: singleton_true_filter_nonempty
reason: a singleton sequence with an element satisfying pred should have nonempty filter — tests contrapositive of the lemma on minimal input

name: element_satisfying_pred_contradicts_empty_filter
reason: directly tests the lemma's conclusion at a specific element — if the forall quantifier is mistriggered this specific instantiation could reveal a gap

name: push_pred_true_makes_filter_nonempty
reason: appending an element satisfying pred should always produce nonempty filter — tests that filter interacts correctly with push regardless of original sequence

name: all_false_pred_implies_filter_len_zero
reason: always-false predicate should yield empty filter on any sequence — tests the converse direction not proven by the lemma
